Video.summary: James, a self-proclaimed "Karma Casanova," must answer for his disrespectful behavior in his relationship with girlfriend Shana.
Video.title: Few vs. Roundtree

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating and a claim for $695 have Jasmine and Gerrel seeking relationship advice.
Video.title: Doggett vs. Townsend

Video.summary: Aspiring social media star Mike sues ex-girlfriend Sidney for nonpayment after she profited from an explicit adult video.
Video.title: Barham vs. Starr

Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: A marriage is on the line as accusations of betrayal and overprotection threaten two decades of love and business.
Video.title: Heard vs. Macon

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for money she says she spent on vacations and car repairs and accuses him of stealing from her co-workers at a company function; a woman says she moved out of an apartment because she feared for her life.
Video.title: Love, Lies and Larceny

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: After a beach getaway raises suspicions, LaBre must convince her husband, Taj, that he is the father of their son.
Video.title: Sewell vs. Sewell

Video.summary: Malu sues her girlfriend, L'Mika, because she failed to repay her for a loan and, instead, went on a cruise without her.
Video.title: Mejilla vs. Kargbo

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating force Dawn to petition his girlfriend, Alexandra, to a polygraph to test her loyalty.
Video.title: Barnes vs. Edge

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Lomecia confronts Tee over infidelity, family interference and broken trust, demanding a lie detector test to save her marriage.
Video.title: Eason vs. Eason

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: When Queen and Demo are unable to work out their pet issues, the Cutlers help determine how these birds of a feather can stick together.
Video.title: Garrett vs. Williams

Video.summary: The ashes of a deceased pet have exes Tianie and Abner rehashing issues from their recent breakup.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: In an emotional case of irreconcilable differences, J'Licia and Jose attempt to save their marriage.
Video.title: Hernandez vs. Hernandez

Video.summary: A woman is prepared to walk away from her boyfriend, the father of her unborn child, because of his party lifestyle.
Video.title: Smith vs. Lamisere

Video.summary: A six-year marriage is on the brink of divorce as Quincy sues husband Jeron for failing to pay the bills.
Video.title: King vs. Johnson

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: After a life-altering amputation, Brooke brings girlfriend Brenna to court to address concerns regarding her caretaking.
Video.title: Fletcher vs. Stewart

Video.summary: Rachel must answer for delaying her nuptials to fiance Blaine after he stuck with her through her prison stint.
Video.title: Cerre vs. Hardy

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: Complaints of excessive weight gain have Georgia couple Tasha and Prez at odds.
Video.title: Mack vs. Tate

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: Yashira seeks to prove that Gregory is the father of her 4-year-old after years of doubt and speculation.
Video.title: Guadalupe vs. Phillips

Video.summary: A stolen car and four slashed tires have exes Tiffany and Jonathan arguing in court over who is at fault.
Video.title: Martin vs. Polite

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: Teresa issues ex-boyfriend Keita an ultimatum: agree to consistent co-parenting or start paying child support.
Video.title: Jefferson vs. Singleton

Video.summary: After things go south while living together, exes Eric and Zaniya counter sue each other over money owed.
Video.title: Keeton vs. Barnett

Video.summary: Angel sues his proclaimed "frienemy with benefits," Celesta, for six months' unpaid rent.
Video.title: Clark vs. Williams

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: Keith wants his girlfriend, Jacey, to take a polygraph test because he suspects she cheated with an older customer at her job.
Video.title: Fitchpatrick vs. Gray

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: Sable suspects girlfriend Mechelle of giving extra during her massage practice and petitions her to take a polygraph test.
Video.title: Myers vs. Crossland

Video.summary: Jerkmeeka issues Rodriquez an ultimatum after his longtime female friend begins interfering in their marriage.
Video.title: Tuggle-Wright vs. Tuggle

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: Jahnasia confronts Kelechi about his sudden emotional distance and possible betrayal after years of planning a future together.
Video.title: Arnold vs. Ijomah

Video.summary: After eight years together, Krystal's pregnancy sparks doubts about her fiancé's addictions and honesty, demanding clarity before marriage.
Video.title: Simmons vs. Stephens

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers

Video.summary: After calling off their wedding, Smilez sues Dejsha for crashing his music video and breaking his $12,000 chain.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Watson

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: Benjamin petitions for a paternity test after his girlfriend, Kenetha, told him during an argument that he is not the father.
Video.title: Brogdon vs. Jenkins

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo
